<h1 data-start="223" data-end="265"><span role="text"><strong data-start="225" data-end="265">Step 1: Prepare Your Dataset (Colab)</strong></span></h1>
<h3 data-start="267" data-end="280">In Colab:</h3>
<ol data-start="281" data-end="356">
<li data-start="281" data-end="334">
<p data-start="284" data-end="334">Upload your dataset files (<code data-start="311" data-end="318">.data</code>, <code data-start="320" data-end="327">.test</code>, etc.)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="335" data-end="356">
<p data-start="338" data-end="356">Load using pandas:</p>
</li>
</ol>

<h3 data-start="693" data-end="712">Basic Cleaning:</h3>

<hr data-start="1817" data-end="1820">
<h1 data-start="1822" data-end="1858"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1824" data-end="1858">Step 4: Deploy (Get Your Link)</strong></span></h1>
<h3 data-start="1860" data-end="1879">Easiest Method:</h3>
<p data-start="1880" data-end="1925">Use <strong data-start="1884" data-end="1925"><span class="hover:entity-accent entity-underline inline cursor-pointer align-baseline"><span class="whitespace-normal">Streamlit Community Cloud</span></span></strong></p>
<h3 data-start="1927" data-end="1937">Steps:</h3>
<ol data-start="1938" data-end="2062">
<li data-start="1938" data-end="1972">
<p data-start="1941" data-end="1972">Upload your project to GitHub</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1973" data-end="1999">
<p data-start="1976" data-end="1999">Go to Streamlit Cloud</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2000" data-end="2029">
<p data-start="2003" data-end="2029">Connect your GitHub repo</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2030" data-end="2050">
<p data-start="2033" data-end="2050">Select <code data-start="2040" data-end="2048">app.py</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="2051" data-end="2062">
<p data-start="2054" data-end="2062">Deploy</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="2064" data-end="2131">✅ You will get a <strong data-start="2081" data-end="2131">public dashboard URL (this is what you submit)</strong></p>
<hr data-start="2133" data-end="2136">
<h1 data-start="2138" data-end="2177"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2140" data-end="2177">Step 5: Screenshot for Your Paper</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="2178" data-end="2308">
<li data-start="2178" data-end="2210">
<p data-start="2180" data-end="2210">Open your deployed dashboard</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2211" data-end="2260">
<p data-start="2213" data-end="2260">Take a screenshot of the <strong data-start="2238" data-end="2258">entire interface</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="2261" data-end="2308">
<p data-start="2263" data-end="2308">Insert into <strong data-start="2275" data-end="2308">Dashboard Explanation section</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2310" data-end="2313">
<h1 data-start="2315" data-end="2344"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2317" data-end="2344">Step 6: What You Submit</strong></span></h1>
<h3 data-start="2346" data-end="2359">Required:</h3>
<ul data-start="2360" data-end="2443">
<li data-start="2360" data-end="2388">
<p data-start="2362" data-end="2388">Dashboard link (Streamlit)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2389" data-end="2413">
<p data-start="2391" data-end="2413">Screenshot (for paper)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2414" data-end="2443">
<p data-start="2416" data-end="2443">Analysis (written sections)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2445" data-end="2448">
<h1 data-start="2450" data-end="2475"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2452" data-end="2475">Simplified Workflow</strong></span></h1>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2477" data-end="2651"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>Excel / Colab → Clean Data</span><br><span>        ↓</span><br><span>Colab → Save cleaned CSV</span><br><span>        ↓</span><br><span>Streamlit → Build dashboard</span><br><span>        ↓</span><br><span>Streamlit Cloud → Deploy</span><br><span>        ↓</span><br><span>Get Link + Screenshot</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<hr data-start="2653" data-end="2656">
<h1 data-start="2658" data-end="2697"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2660" data-end="2697">If You Want an Easier Alternative</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="2698" data-end="2733">If coding feels heavy, you can use:</p>
<ul data-start="2734" data-end="2828">
<li data-start="2734" data-end="2788">
<p data-start="2736" data-end="2788"><span class="hover:entity-accent entity-underline inline cursor-pointer align-baseline"><span class="whitespace-normal">Microsoft Excel</span></span> (with slicers)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2789" data-end="2828">
<p data-start="2791" data-end="2828"><span class="hover:entity-accent entity-underline inline cursor-pointer align-baseline"><span class="whitespace-normal">Microsoft Power BI</span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="2830" data-end="2839">But note:</p>
<ul data-start="2840" data-end="2950">
<li data-start="2840" data-end="2885">
<p data-start="2842" data-end="2885">Only some tools provide <strong data-start="2866" data-end="2885">shareable links</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="2886" data-end="2950">
<p data-start="2888" data-end="2950">Streamlit is usually the safest for “working link” requirement</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2952" data-end="2955">
<h1 data-start="2957" data-end="2977"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2959" data-end="2977">Recommendation</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="2978" data-end="2982">Use:</p>
<ul data-start="2983" data-end="3050">
<li data-start="2983" data-end="3017">
<p data-start="2985" data-end="3017">Colab → cleaning + preparation</p>
</li>
<li data-start="3018" data-end="3050">
<p data-start="3020" data-end="3050">Streamlit → dashboard + link</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="3052" data-end="3105">This directly satisfies <strong data-start="3076" data-end="3104">all project requirements</strong>.</p>

<h1 data-start="1907" data-end="1938"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1909" data-end="1938">What “Success” Looks Like</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="1940" data-end="1965">After running all checks:</p>
<ul data-start="1966" data-end="2076">
<li data-start="1966" data-end="1987">
<p data-start="1968" data-end="1987">No missing values</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1988" data-end="2005">
<p data-start="1990" data-end="2005">No duplicates</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2006" data-end="2030">
<p data-start="2008" data-end="2030">Clean category names</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2031" data-end="2076">
<p data-start="2033" data-end="2076">Logical distributions (no strange values)</p>
</li>
</ul>

<h1 data-start="2083" data-end="2107"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2085" data-end="2107">Tip for Your Paper</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="2108" data-end="2122">You can write:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2124" data-end="2344">
<p data-start="2126" data-end="2344">“Post-cleaning validation confirmed that all missing values and duplicate records were removed. Data consistency checks and distribution analysis were performed to ensure the dataset was suitable for further analysis.”</p>
</blockquote>

flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="221">Given your dataset (<strong data-start="20" data-end="43">Adult Census Income</strong>), you can still satisfy all required visualization types—even though it is <strong data-start="119" data-end="153">not naturally time-series data</strong>. The key is to <strong data-start="169" data-end="220">engineer or reinterpret variables appropriately</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="223" data-end="336">Below is a <strong data-start="234" data-end="302">practical mapping of each required visualization to your dataset</strong>, including exactly what to build:</p>
<hr data-start="338" data-end="341">
<h1 data-start="343" data-end="408"><span role="text"><strong data-start="345" data-end="386">1. Time-Series Chart (Trend Analysis)</strong> ⚠️ (Most challenging)</span></h1>
<h3 data-start="410" data-end="473"><span role="text"><strong data-start="414" data-end="473">Option A (Recommended): Age as a “Pseudo-Time” Variable</strong></span></h3>
<p data-start="474" data-end="515">Treat <strong data-start="480" data-end="487">age</strong> as a progression over time.</p>
<p data-start="517" data-end="527"><strong data-start="517" data-end="527">Chart:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="528" data-end="602">
<li data-start="528" data-end="577">
<p data-start="530" data-end="577">X-axis: Age (or age groups: 20–30, 30–40, etc.)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="578" data-end="602">
<p data-start="580" data-end="602">Y-axis: % earning &gt;50K</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="604" data-end="616"><strong data-start="604" data-end="616">Purpose:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="617" data-end="673">
<li data-start="617" data-end="673">
<p data-start="619" data-end="673">Shows how income likelihood changes across life stages</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="675" data-end="678">
<h3 data-start="680" data-end="739"><span role="text"><strong data-start="684" data-end="739">Option B (Alternative): Education Level Progression</strong></span></h3>
<ul data-start="740" data-end="800">
<li data-start="740" data-end="775">
<p data-start="742" data-end="775">X-axis: Education level (ordered)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="776" data-end="800">
<p data-start="778" data-end="800">Y-axis: % earning &gt;50K</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="802" data-end="835">This mimics a “progression trend”</p>
<hr data-start="837" data-end="840">
<h1 data-start="842" data-end="871"><span role="text"><strong data-start="844" data-end="869">2. Bar / Column Chart</strong> ✅</span></h1>
<h3 data-start="873" data-end="904"><span role="text"><strong data-start="877" data-end="904">Chart: Gender vs Income</strong></span></h3>
<ul data-start="905" data-end="1007">
<li data-start="905" data-end="936">
<p data-start="907" data-end="936">X-axis: Gender (Male, Female)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="937" data-end="978">
<p data-start="939" data-end="978">Y-axis: Count or % of income categories</p>
</li>
<li data-start="979" data-end="1007">
<p data-start="981" data-end="1007">Grouped bars: ≤50K vs &gt;50K</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1009" data-end="1021"><strong data-start="1009" data-end="1021">Purpose:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1022" data-end="1054">
<li data-start="1022" data-end="1054">
<p data-start="1024" data-end="1054">Directly shows gender wage gap</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1056" data-end="1059">
<h1 data-start="1061" data-end="1089"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1063" data-end="1087">3. Pie / Donut Chart</strong> ✅</span></h1>
<h3 data-start="1091" data-end="1133"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1095" data-end="1133">Chart: Overall Income Distribution</strong></span></h3>
<ul data-start="1134" data-end="1165">
<li data-start="1134" data-end="1165">
<p data-start="1136" data-end="1143">Slices:</p>
<ul data-start="1146" data-end="1165">
<li data-start="1146" data-end="1154">
<p data-start="1148" data-end="1154">≤50K</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1157" data-end="1165">
<blockquote data-start="1159" data-end="1165">
<p data-start="1160" data-end="1165">50K</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1167" data-end="1179"><strong data-start="1167" data-end="1179">Purpose:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1180" data-end="1213">
<li data-start="1180" data-end="1213">
<p data-start="1182" data-end="1213">Shows overall dataset imbalance</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1215" data-end="1218">
<h1 data-start="1220" data-end="1253"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1222" data-end="1251">4. Scorecard (Key Metric)</strong> ✅</span></h1>
<h3 data-start="1255" data-end="1289"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1259" data-end="1289">Metric Options (Pick 1–2):</strong></span></h3>
<ul data-start="1290" data-end="1468">
<li data-start="1290" data-end="1323">
<p data-start="1292" data-end="1323">% of individuals earning &gt;50K</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1324" data-end="1434">
<p data-start="1326" data-end="1353">Gender wage gap difference:</p>
<ul data-start="1356" data-end="1434">
<li data-start="1356" data-end="1434">
<p data-start="1358" data-end="1434">Example:<br data-start="1366" data-end="1369">
“Males earning &gt;50K: 30%”<br data-start="1398" data-end="1401">
“Females earning &gt;50K: 12%”</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="1435" data-end="1468">
<p data-start="1437" data-end="1468">Average hours worked per week</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1470" data-end="1487"><strong data-start="1470" data-end="1487">Displayed as:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1488" data-end="1523">
<li data-start="1488" data-end="1523">
<p data-start="1490" data-end="1523">Large number (no chart, just KPI)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1525" data-end="1528">
<h1 data-start="1530" data-end="1551"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1532" data-end="1549">5. Data Table</strong> ✅</span></h1>
<h3 data-start="1553" data-end="1574"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1557" data-end="1574">Table Content</strong></span></h3>
<p data-start="1575" data-end="1614">Include a filtered or summarized table:</p>
<p data-start="1616" data-end="1645"><strong data-start="1616" data-end="1645">Option A: Raw Data Sample</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1646" data-end="1669">
<li data-start="1646" data-end="1669">
<p data-start="1648" data-end="1669">Show first 10–20 rows</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1671" data-end="1710"><strong data-start="1671" data-end="1710">Option B (Better): Aggregated Table</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1711" data-end="1770">
<li data-start="1711" data-end="1770">
<p data-start="1713" data-end="1721">Columns:</p>
<ul data-start="1724" data-end="1770">
<li data-start="1724" data-end="1734">
<p data-start="1726" data-end="1734">Gender</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1737" data-end="1745">
<p data-start="1739" data-end="1745">Race</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1748" data-end="1757">
<p data-start="1750" data-end="1757">Count</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1760" data-end="1770">
<p data-start="1762" data-end="1770">% &gt;50K</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1772" data-end="1775">

<h1 data-start="2057" data-end="2094"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2059" data-end="2094">Important Note (For Your Paper)</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="2096" data-end="2170">Since the dataset has no true time variable, you can justify it like this:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2172" data-end="2306">
<p data-start="2174" data-end="2306">“As the dataset does not contain temporal data, age was used as a proxy variable to analyze trends across different stages of life.”</p>
</blockquote>

-----------------------------</span><br><span class="ͼt">st</span><span class="ͼn">.</span><span>subheader(</span><span class="ͼr">"Raw Data Preview"</span><span>)</span><br><span class="ͼt">st</span><span class="ͼn">.</span><span>dataframe(</span><span class="ͼt">filtered_df</span><span class="ͼn">.</span><span>head(</span><span class="ͼq">20</span><span>))</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>

<h1 data-start="2145" data-end="2171"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2147" data-end="2171">Recommended Workflow</strong></span></h1>

<li data-start="2234" data-end="2263">

</li>
<li data-start="2264" data-end="2302">
<p data-start="2267" data-end="2302">Later → copy logic into Streamlit</p>
</li>
</ol>

<p data-start="2061" data-end="2107">✔ This shows <strong data-start="2074" data-end="2107">intersection of gender + race</strong></p>

<hr data-start="2664" data-end="2667">
<h1 data-start="2669" data-end="2686"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2671" data-end="2686">Key Insight</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="2688" data-end="2710">Your project is about:</p>
<blockquote data-start="2711" data-end="2762">
<p data-start="2713" data-end="2762"><strong data-start="2713" data-end="2762">“Who earns more and why (by gender and race)”</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<p data-start="2764" data-end="2792">So your visuals must answer:</p>
<ul data-start="2793" data-end="2902">
<li data-start="2793" data-end="2825">
<p data-start="2795" data-end="2825">Do men earn more than women?</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2826" data-end="2869">
<p data-start="2828" data-end="2869">Do certain races earn more than others?</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2870" data-end="2902">
<p data-start="2872" data-end="2902">How big are those differences?</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2904" data-end="2907">
<h1 data-start="2909" data-end="2925"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2911" data-end="2925">Conclusion</strong></span></h1>

<li data-start="2927" data-end="2979">

</li>
<li data-start="2980" data-end="3038">
<p data-start="2982" data-end="3038">But <strong data-start="2986" data-end="3036">not fully aligned with your research objective</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="3039" data-end="3103">
<p data-start="3041" data-end="3103">With 2–3 small adjustments, they become <strong data-start="3081" data-end="3103">strong and focused</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>

<p data-start="975" data-end="991"><strong data-start="975" data-end="991">Explanation:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="992" data-end="1160">
<li data-start="992" data-end="1057">
<p data-start="994" data-end="1057">Shows <strong data-start="1000" data-end="1055">proportion of ≤50K vs &gt;50K within each racial group</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1058" data-end="1100">
<p data-start="1060" data-end="1100">Highlights racial disparities visually</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1101" data-end="1160">
<p data-start="1103" data-end="1160">Creates <strong data-start="1111" data-end="1137">one pie chart per race</strong> for clear comparison</p>
</li>
</ul>

justify-self-start text-token-text-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-sm me-2.5 shrink-0"><use <p data-start="1821" data-end="1837"><strong data-start="1821" data-end="1837">Explanation:</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1838" data-end="1995">
<li data-start="1838" data-end="1886">
<p data-start="1840" data-end="1886">Shows <strong data-start="1846" data-end="1884">% of males vs females earning &gt;50K</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1887" data-end="1928">
<p data-start="1889" data-end="1928">Calculates <strong data-start="1900" data-end="1926">direct gender wage gap</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1929" data-end="1995">
<p data-start="1931" data-end="1995">Can be adapted as <strong data-start="1949" data-end="1969">Streamlit metric</strong> later using <code data-start="1982" data-end="1995">st.metric()</code></p>
</li>
</ul>

<hr data-start="312" data-end="315">
<h1 data-start="317" data-end="341"><span role="text"><strong data-start="319" data-end="341">1. Cleaned Dataset</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="342" data-end="580">
<li data-start="342" data-end="389">
<p data-start="344" data-end="389">You already have <code data-start="361" data-end="380">cleaned_adult.csv</code> (good)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="390" data-end="482">
<p data-start="392" data-end="482">Make sure it is <strong data-start="408" data-end="435">included with your code</strong> or linked in your GitHub repo for deployment</p>
</li>
<li data-start="483" data-end="580">
<p data-start="485" data-end="580">Keep a <strong data-start="492" data-end="502">backup</strong> of the original raw dataset in case reviewers want to see preprocessing steps</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="582" data-end="585">
<h1 data-start="587" data-end="616"><span role="text"><strong data-start="589" data-end="616">2. Supporting Libraries</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="617" data-end="666">Streamlit alone is fine, but your code also uses:</p>
<ul data-start="667" data-end="738">
<li data-start="667" data-end="677">
<p data-start="669" data-end="677"><code data-start="669" data-end="677">pandas</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="678" data-end="692">
<p data-start="680" data-end="692"><code data-start="680" data-end="692">matplotlib</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="693" data-end="738">
<p data-start="695" data-end="738">Optionally <code data-start="706" data-end="713">numpy</code> (if you do calculations)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="740" data-end="812"><strong data-start="740" data-end="774">Make sure to list dependencies</strong> in <code data-start="778" data-end="796">requirements.txt</code> for deployment:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="814" data-end="849"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>streamlit</span><br><span>pandas</span><br><span>matplotlib</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<p data-start="851" data-end="937">Later, Streamlit Cloud or other deployment platforms will install these automatically.</p>
<hr data-start="939" data-end="942">
<h1 data-start="944" data-end="993"><span role="text"><strong data-start="946" data-end="993">3. Optional: Additional Visual Enhancements</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="994" data-end="1050">These aren’t strictly required, but can improve grading:</p>
<ul data-start="1051" data-end="1282">
<li data-start="1051" data-end="1109">
<p data-start="1053" data-end="1109">Bar charts for <strong data-start="1068" data-end="1086">race vs income</strong> (stacked or grouped)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1110" data-end="1192">
<p data-start="1112" data-end="1192">Optional combined <strong data-start="1130" data-end="1153">gender + race table</strong> (already in your data table section)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1193" data-end="1282">
<p data-start="1195" data-end="1219">Better chart formatting:</p>
<ul data-start="1222" data-end="1282">
<li data-start="1222" data-end="1253">
<p data-start="1224" data-end="1253">Titles, axis labels, colors</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1256" data-end="1282">
<p data-start="1258" data-end="1282">Consistent figure size</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1284" data-end="1287">
<h1 data-start="1289" data-end="1308"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1291" data-end="1308">4. Deployment</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1309" data-end="1501">
<li data-start="1309" data-end="1451">
<p data-start="1311" data-end="1367">Streamlit apps need to be <strong data-start="1337" data-end="1347">hosted</strong> for a working link:</p>
<ul data-start="1370" data-end="1451">
<li data-start="1370" data-end="1417">
<p data-start="1372" data-end="1417"><strong data-start="1372" data-end="1401">Streamlit Community Cloud</strong> (recommended)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1420" data-end="1451">
<p data-start="1422" data-end="1451">GitHub repo linked → deploy</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="1452" data-end="1501">
<p data-start="1454" data-end="1501">Make sure the link is <strong data-start="1476" data-end="1486">public</strong> for submission</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1503" data-end="1506">
<h1 data-start="1508" data-end="1538"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1510" data-end="1538">5. Screenshots for Paper</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="1539" data-end="1587">Even with a live dashboard link, you still need:</p>
<ul data-start="1588" data-end="1713">
<li data-start="1588" data-end="1657">
<p data-start="1590" data-end="1657"><strong data-start="1590" data-end="1619">Full dashboard screenshot</strong> for <em data-start="1624" data-end="1647">Dashboard Explanation</em> section</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1658" data-end="1713">
<p data-start="1660" data-end="1713">Optionally separate charts for <em data-start="1691" data-end="1705">Key Insights</em> section</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1715" data-end="1718">
<h1 data-start="1720" data-end="1745"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1722" data-end="1745">6. Written Sections</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="1746" data-end="1770">Make sure you have your:</p>
<ul data-start="1771" data-end="2029">
<li data-start="1771" data-end="1801">
<p data-start="1773" data-end="1801">Introduction and Objective</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1802" data-end="1829">
<p data-start="1804" data-end="1829">Data Source Description</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1830" data-end="1856">
<p data-start="1832" data-end="1856">Data Collection Method</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1857" data-end="1890">
<p data-start="1859" data-end="1890">Data Cleaning and Preparation</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1891" data-end="1934">
<p data-start="1893" data-end="1934">Dashboard Explanation (with screenshot)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1935" data-end="1970">
<p data-start="1937" data-end="1970">Key Insights and Interpretation</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1971" data-end="1994">
<p data-start="1973" data-end="1994">Dataset Limitations</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1995" data-end="2029">
<p data-start="1997" data-end="2029">Conclusion and Recommendations</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2031" data-end="2034">
<h1 data-start="2036" data-end="2052"><span role="text"><strong data-start="2038" data-end="2052">7. Testing</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="2053" data-end="2071">Before submitting:</p>
<ul data-start="2072" data-end="2268">
<li data-start="2072" data-end="2117">
<p data-start="2074" data-end="2117">Run the app locally or on Streamlit Cloud</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2118" data-end="2169">
<p data-start="2120" data-end="2169">Check <strong data-start="2126" data-end="2152">filters work correctly</strong> (gender, race)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="2170" data-end="2211">
<p data-start="2172" data-end="2211">Check <strong data-start="2178" data-end="2209">all charts display properly</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="2212" data-end="2268">
<p data-start="2214" data-end="2268">Make sure the dataset and code <strong data-start="2245" data-end="2268">load without errors</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2270" data-end="2273">
<p data-start="2275" data-end="2561">✅ <strong data-start="2277" data-end="2289">Summary:</strong><br data-start="2289" data-end="2292">
With <strong data-start="2297" data-end="2402">Streamlit + cleaned dataset + matplotlib/pandas libraries + deployment + screenshots + written report</strong>, you’re set. No other software is strictly required unless you want extra polish (like Plotly for interactive charts or Excel for preprocessing verification).</p>

<hr data-start="223" data-end="226">
<h1 data-start="228" data-end="266"><span role="text"><strong data-start="230" data-end="266">Step 1: Prepare Your GitHub Repo</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="268" data-end="622">
<li data-start="268" data-end="366">
<p data-start="271" data-end="310"><strong data-start="271" data-end="298">Create a new repository</strong> on GitHub</p>
<ul data-start="314" data-end="366">
<li data-start="314" data-end="366">
<p data-start="316" data-end="366">Name it something like: <code data-start="340" data-end="364">adult-income-dashboard</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="368" data-end="578">
<p data-start="371" data-end="398"><strong data-start="371" data-end="397">Add your project files</strong>:</p>
<ul data-start="402" data-end="578">
<li data-start="402" data-end="436">
<p data-start="404" data-end="436"><code data-start="404" data-end="412">app.py</code> → your Streamlit code</p>
</li>
<li data-start="440" data-end="477">
<p data-start="442" data-end="477"><code data-start="442" data-end="461">cleaned_adult.csv</code> → the dataset</p>
</li>
<li data-start="481" data-end="578">
<p data-start="483" data-end="513">Optional: <code data-start="493" data-end="511">requirements.txt</code></p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="519" data-end="578"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>streamlit</span><br><span>pandas</span><br><span>matplotlib</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="580" data-end="622">
<p data-start="583" data-end="622"><strong data-start="583" data-end="602">Commit and push</strong> all files to GitHub</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="624" data-end="627">
<h1 data-start="629" data-end="669"><span role="text"><strong data-start="631" data-end="669">Step 2: Sign in to Streamlit Cloud</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="671" data-end="799">
<li data-start="671" data-end="739">
<p data-start="674" data-end="739">Go to: <a data-start="681" data-end="737" rel="noopener" target="_new" class="decorated-link" href="https://streamlit.io/cloud">https://streamlit.io/cloud<span aria-hidden="true" class="ms-0.5 inline-block align-middle leading-none"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" data-rtl-flip="" class="block h-[0.75em] w-[0.75em] stroke-current stroke-[0.75]"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#304883" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></span></a></p>
</li>
<li data-start="740" data-end="776">
<p data-start="743" data-end="776">Sign in with <strong data-start="756" data-end="774">GitHub account</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="777" data-end="799">
<p data-start="780" data-end="799">Click <strong data-start="786" data-end="799">“New app”</strong></p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="801" data-end="804">
<h1 data-start="806" data-end="838"><span role="text"><strong data-start="808" data-end="838">Step 3: Connect Repository</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="840" data-end="985">
<li data-start="840" data-end="878">
<p data-start="843" data-end="878">Select your <strong data-start="855" data-end="876">GitHub repository</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="879" data-end="918">
<p data-start="882" data-end="918">Select the branch (usually <code data-start="909" data-end="915">main</code>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="919" data-end="963">
<p data-start="922" data-end="963">Enter the <strong data-start="932" data-end="950">main file path</strong> → <code data-start="953" data-end="961">app.py</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="964" data-end="985">
<p data-start="967" data-end="985">Click <strong data-start="973" data-end="985">“Deploy”</strong></p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="987" data-end="990">
<h1 data-start="992" data-end="1025"><span role="text"><strong data-start="994" data-end="1025">Step 4: Wait for Deployment</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1027" data-end="1236">
<li data-start="1027" data-end="1122">
<p data-start="1029" data-end="1050">Streamlit Cloud will:</p>
<ul data-start="1053" data-end="1122">
<li data-start="1053" data-end="1101">
<p data-start="1055" data-end="1101">Install dependencies from <code data-start="1081" data-end="1099">requirements.txt</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1104" data-end="1122">
<p data-start="1106" data-end="1122">Launch the app</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="1124" data-end="1236">
<p data-start="1126" data-end="1173">Once done, you’ll get a <strong data-start="1150" data-end="1164">public URL</strong>, e.g.:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1176" data-end="1236"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>https://your-username-streamlitapp.streamlit.app</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1238" data-end="1241">
<h1 data-start="1243" data-end="1281"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1245" data-end="1281">Step 5: Test Your Live Dashboard</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="1283" data-end="1471">
<li data-start="1283" data-end="1313">
<p data-start="1286" data-end="1313">Open the URL in a browser</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1314" data-end="1471">
<p data-start="1317" data-end="1323">Check:</p>
<ul data-start="1327" data-end="1471">
<li data-start="1327" data-end="1358">
<p data-start="1329" data-end="1358">Filters (gender, race) work</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1362" data-end="1394">
<p data-start="1364" data-end="1394">All charts display correctly</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1398" data-end="1433">
<p data-start="1400" data-end="1433">Data table shows correct values</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1437" data-end="1471">
<p data-start="1439" data-end="1471">Scorecard metrics are accurate</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="1473" data-end="1476">
<h1 data-start="1478" data-end="1517"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1480" data-end="1517">Step 6: Screenshot for Your Paper</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1519" data-end="1664">
<li data-start="1519" data-end="1581">
<p data-start="1521" data-end="1581">Take a <strong data-start="1528" data-end="1552">full-page screenshot</strong> of the dashboard interface</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1582" data-end="1664">
<p data-start="1584" data-end="1664">Save as <code data-start="1592" data-end="1618">dashboard_screenshot.png</code> → insert in <strong data-start="1631" data-end="1664">Dashboard Explanation section</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1666" data-end="1669">
<h1 data-start="1671" data-end="1699"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1673" data-end="1699">Step 7: Share the Link</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1701" data-end="1807">
<li data-start="1701" data-end="1760">

</li>

</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1809" data-end="1812">

</span><span class="ͼr">"&gt;50K"</span><span>]</span><span class="ͼn">.</span><span>groupby(</span><span class="ͼr">"sex"</span><span>)[</span><span class="ͼr">"income"</span><span>]</span><span yet</strong>. VS Code uses whatever Python interpreter you have active, so you need to install Streamlit there first.</p>
<p data-start="196" data-end="217">Here’s how to fix it:</p>
<hr data-start="219" data-end="222">
<h1 data-start="224" data-end="258"><span role="text"><strong data-start="226" data-end="258">Step 1: Check Python Version</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="259" data-end="289">Open VS Code terminal and run:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="291" data-end="319"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>python </span><span class="ͼu">--version</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<p data-start="321" data-end="387">Make sure it’s <strong data-start="336" data-end="360">Python 3.7 or higher</strong> (Streamlit requires 3.7+).</p>
<hr data-start="389" data-end="392">
<h1 data-start="394" data-end="425"><span role="text"><strong data-start="396" data-end="425">Step 2: Install Streamlit</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="426" data-end="430">Run:</p>

margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>pip install streamlit pandas matplotlib</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; <ul data-start="485" data-end="606">
<li data-start="485" data-end="546">
<p data-start="487" data-end="546"><code data-start="487" data-end="495">pandas</code> and <code data-start="500" data-end="512">matplotlib</code> are required for your dashboard</p>

<h1 data-start="677" data-end="710"><span role="text"><strong data-start="679" data-end="710">Step 3: Verify Installation</strong></span></h1>

<h1 data-start="801" data-end="827"><span role="text"><strong data-start="803" data-end="827">Step 4: Run Your App</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="828" data-end="888">Navigate to your project folder (where <code data-start="867" data-end="875">app.py</code> is) and run:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="890" data-end="922"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>streamlit run app.py</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; <p data-start="924" data-end="973">A browser window should open with your dashboard.</p>
<hr data-start="975" data-end="978">
<h1 data-start="980" data-end="1007"><span role="text"><strong data-start="982" data-end="1007">Common VS Code Issues</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="1008" data-end="1323">
<li data-start="1008" data-end="1190">
<p data-start="1011" data-end="1041"><strong data-start="1011" data-end="1039">Wrong Python Interpreter</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1045" data-end="1190">
<li data-start="1045" data-end="1114">
<p data-start="1047" data-end="1114">Click the <strong data-start="1057" data-end="1101">Python version in the bottom-left corner</strong> of VS Code</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1118" data-end="1190">
<p data-start="1120" data-end="1190">Make sure it points to the environment where you installed Streamlit</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="1192" data-end="1323">
<p data-start="1195" data-end="1220"><strong data-start="1195" data-end="1218">Virtual Environment</strong></p>
<ul data-start="1224" data-end="1323">
<li data-start="1224" data-end="1323">
<p data-start="1226" data-end="1323">If using a virtual environment (<code data-start="1258" data-end="1264">venv</code> or <code data-start="1268" data-end="1275">conda</code>), make sure it’s activated in VS Code terminal:</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1325" data-end="1410"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; <p data-start="206" data-end="228">Here’s how that works:</p>
<hr data-start="230" data-end="233">
<h1 data-start="235" data-end="264"><span role="text"><strong data-start="237" data-end="264">1. Prepare Your Project</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="266" data-end="285">Make sure you have:</p>
<ul data-start="287" data-end="397">
<li data-start="287" data-end="321">
<p data-start="289" data-end="321"><code data-start="289" data-end="297">app.py</code> → your Streamlit code</p>
</li>
<li data-start="322" data-end="360">
<p data-start="324" data-end="360"><code data-start="324" data-end="343">cleaned_adult.csv</code> → your dataset</p>
</li>
<li data-start="361" data-end="397">
<p data-start="363" data-end="397">Optional: <code data-start="373" data-end="391">requirements.txt</code> with:</p>
</li>
</ul>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="399" data-end="438"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>streamlit</span><br><span>pandas</span><br><span>matplotlib</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<ul data-start="440" data-end="488">
<li data-start="440" data-end="488">
<p data-start="442" data-end="488">Put all files in one folder and push to GitHub</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="490" data-end="493">
<h1 data-start="495" data-end="539"><span role="text"><strong data-start="497" data-end="539">2. Deploy on Streamlit Community Cloud</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="541" data-end="779">
<li data-start="541" data-end="632">
<p data-start="544" data-end="632">Go to <a data-start="550" data-end="606" rel="noopener" target="_new" class="decorated-link" href="https://streamlit.io/cloud">https://streamlit.io/cloud<span aria-hidden="true" class="ms-0.5 inline-block align-middle leading-none"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" data-rtl-flip="" class="block h-[0.75em] w-[0.75em] stroke-current stroke-[0.75]"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#304883" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></span></a> and sign in with GitHub</p>
</li>
<li data-start="633" data-end="657">
<p data-start="636" data-end="657">Click <strong data-start="642" data-end="655">“New app”</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="658" data-end="720">
<p data-start="661" data-end="720">Select your GitHub repository and branch (usually <code data-start="711" data-end="717">main</code>)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="721" data-end="757">
<p data-start="724" data-end="757">Enter <code data-start="730" data-end="738">app.py</code> as the main file</p>
</li>
<li data-start="758" data-end="779">
<p data-start="761" data-end="779">Click <strong data-start="767" data-end="777">Deploy</strong></p>
</li>
</ol>
<p data-start="781" data-end="967">✅ Streamlit Cloud will automatically install all dependencies from <code data-start="848" data-end="866">requirements.txt</code> and run your app<br data-start="883" data-end="886">
✅ You get a <strong data-start="898" data-end="912">public URL</strong> for your dashboard without installing anything locally</p>
<hr data-start="969" data-end="972">
<h1 data-start="974" data-end="997"><span role="text"><strong data-start="976" data-end="997">3. Test and Share</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="999" data-end="1103">
<li data-start="999" data-end="1031">
<p data-start="1001" data-end="1031">Open the URL in your browser</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1032" data-end="1068">
<p data-start="1034" data-end="1068">Test filters, charts, and tables</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1069" data-end="1103">
<p data-start="1071" data-end="1103">Take a screenshot for your paper</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1105" data-end="1108">
<h1 data-start="1110" data-end="1151"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1112" data-end="1151">Pros of Using Cloud Deployment Only</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1153" data-end="1294">
<li data-start="1153" data-end="1203">
<p data-start="1155" data-end="1203">No need to install Python or Streamlit locally</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1204" data-end="1244">
<p data-start="1206" data-end="1244">Works on any computer with a browser</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1245" data-end="1294">
<p data-start="1247" data-end="1294">Deployment is automatic with GitHub integration</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1296" data-end="1299">
<h1 data-start="1301" data-end="1333"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1303" data-end="1333">Cons / Things to Watch Out</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1335" data-end="1532">
<li data-start="1335" data-end="1397">
<p data-start="1337" data-end="1397">Dataset file (<code data-start="1351" data-end="1370">cleaned_adult.csv</code>) <strong data-start="1372" data-end="1395">must be in the repo</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1398" data-end="1455">
<p data-start="1400" data-end="1455"><code data-start="1400" data-end="1418">requirements.txt</code> must include all libraries you use</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1456" data-end="1532">
<p data-start="1458" data-end="1532">You can’t test updates locally unless you clone the repo and run Streamlit</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1534" data-end="1537">
<p data-start="1539" data-end="1693">Basically, if your goal is <strong data-start="1566" data-end="1614">just a working dashboard link for submission</strong>, you can go <strong data-start="1627" data-end="1658">directly to Streamlit Cloud</strong> and never touch the local setup.</p>
<p data-start="1695" data-end="1853" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can give you a <strong data-start="1725" data-end="1798">step-by-step guide to deploy your current <code data-start="1769" data-end="1777">app.py</code> to Streamlit Cloud</strong> so it works the first time. <hr data-start="173" data-end="176">
<h1 data-start="178" data-end="215"><span role="text"><strong data-start="180" data-end="215">Step 1: Install Git (if needed)</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="217" data-end="245">
<li data-start="217" data-end="245">
<p data-start="219" data-end="245">Check if Git is installed:</p>
</li>
</ul>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="247" data-end="272"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="sticky z-2 select-none top-(--sticky-padding-top)"><div class="flex w-full items-center justify-between py-1.5 ps-4 pe-1.5 font-sans md:ps-5 bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary"><div class="flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 cursor-default items-center text-sm font-medium justify-self-start text-token-text-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-sm me-2.5 shrink-0"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#e45ab3" fill="currentColor"></use></svg>Bash</div><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-0.5 justify-self-end"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div></div></div><div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4"><div class="pointer-events-none sticky z-40 shrink-0 z-1!" style="top: calc(calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px) - 1px * 3); margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> </span><span class="ͼu">--version</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<ul data-start="274" data-end="464">
<li data-start="274" data-end="464">
<p data-start="276" data-end="295">If not installed:</p>
<ul data-start="298" data-end="464">
<li data-start="298" data-end="366">
<p data-start="300" data-end="366"><strong data-start="300" data-end="312">Windows:</strong> <a data-start="313" data-end="364" rel="noopener" target="_new" class="decorated-link" href="https://git-scm.com/download/win">Git for Windows<span aria-hidden="true" class="ms-0.5 inline-block align-middle leading-none"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" data-rtl-flip="" class="block h-[0.75em] w-[0.75em] stroke-current stroke-[0.75]"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#304883" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></span></a></p>
</li>
<li data-start="369" data-end="424">
<p data-start="371" data-end="424"><strong data-start="371" data-end="379">Mac:</strong> <code data-start="380" data-end="398">brew install git</code> (if Homebrew installed)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="427" data-end="464">
<p data-start="429" data-end="464"><strong data-start="429" data-end="439">Linux:</strong> <code data-start="440" data-end="462">sudo apt install git</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="466" data-end="469">
<h1 data-start="471" data-end="511"><span role="text"><strong data-start="473" data-end="511">Step 2: Create a GitHub Repository</strong></span></h1>
<ol data-start="513" data-end="781">
<li data-start="513" data-end="573">
<p data-start="516" data-end="573">Go to <a data-start="522" data-end="550" rel="noopener" target="_new" class="decorated-link" href="https://github.com/">GitHub<span aria-hidden="true" class="ms-0.5 inline-block align-middle leading-none"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" data-rtl-flip="" class="block h-[0.75em] w-[0.75em] stroke-current stroke-[0.75]"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#304883" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></span></a> → <strong data-start="553" data-end="571">New Repository</strong></p>
</li>
<li data-start="574" data-end="618">
<p data-start="577" data-end="618">Name it, e.g., <code data-start="592" data-end="616">adult-income-dashboard</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="619" data-end="654">
<p data-start="622" data-end="654">Add <strong data-start="626" data-end="641">description</strong> (optional)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="655" data-end="723">
<p data-start="658" data-end="723">Set visibility to <strong data-start="676" data-end="686">Public</strong> (so Streamlit Cloud can access it)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="724" data-end="781">
<p data-start="727" data-end="781">Don’t initialize with a README (we’ll do it locally)</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="783" data-end="786">
<h1 data-start="788" data-end="824"><span role="text"><strong data-start="790" data-end="824">Step 3: Initialize Git Locally</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="826" data-end="930">Open <strong data-start="831" data-end="860">terminal/VS Code terminal</strong> in your project folder (where <code data-start="891" data-end="899">app.py</code> and <code data-start="904" data-end="923">cleaned_adult.csv</code> are)</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="932" data-end="952"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> init</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; <hr data-start="954" data-end="957">
<h1 data-start="959" data-end="989"><span role="text"><strong data-start="961" data-end="989">Step 4: Add Files to Git</strong></span></h1>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="991" data-end="1012"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; <p data-start="1014" data-end="1072">This stages all files in your folder for the first commit.</p>
<hr data-start="1074" data-end="1077">
<h1 data-start="1079" data-end="1107"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1081" data-end="1107">Step 5: Commit Changes</strong></span></h1>

<hr data-start="1184" data-end="1187">
<h1 data-start="1189" data-end="1228"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1191" data-end="1228">Step 6: Link to GitHub Repository</strong></span></h1>
<p data-start="1230" data-end="1350">Copy the <strong data-start="1239" data-end="1253">HTTPS link</strong> from your GitHub repo (it looks like <code data-start="1291" data-end="1347">https://github.com/username/adult-income-dashboard.git</code>)</p>
<p data-start="1352" data-end="1361">Then run:</p>

<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1488" data-end="1581"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; <ul data-start="1583" data-end="1713">
<li data-start="1583" data-end="1713">
<p data-start="1585" data-end="1713">You may be prompted to enter your GitHub username and personal access token (instead of password, GitHub requires a token now)</p>
</li>

<hr data-start="1715" data-end="1718">
<h1 data-start="1720" data-end="1740"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1722" data-end="1740">Step 8: Verify</strong></span></h1>
<ul data-start="1742" data-end="1865">
<li data-start="1742" data-end="1781">
<p data-start="1744" data-end="1781">Go to your GitHub repo in a browser</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1782" data-end="1865">
<p data-start="1784" data-end="1865">All files (<code data-start="1795" data-end="1803">app.py</code>, <code data-start="1805" data-end="1824">cleaned_adult.csv</code>, <code data-start="1826" data-end="1844">requirements.txt</code>) should be visible</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1867" data-end="1870">

<h2 data-start="107" data-end="134"><span role="text"><strong data-start="110" data-end="134">1. Open the Terminal</strong></span></h2>
<ul data-start="136" data-end="270">
<li data-start="136" data-end="235">
<p data-start="138" data-end="235"><strong data-start="138" data-end="150">Windows:</strong> Open Command Prompt or PowerShell, or use VS Code integrated terminal (`Ctrl + ``)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="236" data-end="270">
<p data-start="238" data-end="270"><strong data-start="238" data-end="254">Mac / Linux:</strong> Open Terminal</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="272" data-end="275">

<h2 data-start="444" data-end="485"><span role="text"><strong data-start="447" data-end="485">3. Navigate to Your Project Folder</strong></span></h2>
<p data-start="487" data-end="530">Assume your project folder is located at:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="532" data-end="582"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>C:\Users\YourName\Documents\AdultDashboard</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<p data-start="584" data-end="596"><strong data-start="584" data-end="596">Windows:</strong></p>

<h2 data-start="1103" data-end="1123"><span role="text"><strong data-start="1106" data-end="1123">6. Quick Tips</strong></span></h2>
<ul data-start="1125" data-end="1265">
<li data-start="1125" data-end="1206">
<p data-start="1127" data-end="1206"><strong data-start="1127" data-end="1146">Tab completion:</strong> Start typing folder name and press <code data-start="1182" data-end="1187">Tab</code> to auto-complete</p>
</li>
<li data-start="1207" data-end="1265">
<p data-start="1209" data-end="1265"><strong data-start="1209" data-end="1236">Spaces in folder names:</strong> Use quotes or escape spaces:</p>
</li>
</ul>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1267" data-end="1328"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; <p data-start="290" data-end="345">Make sure all files are added (you did this in Step 4):</p>

<li data-start="370" data-end="398">
<p data-start="373" data-end="398">Create your first commit:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="400" data-end="473"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> commit </span><span class="ͼu">-m</span><span> </span><span class="ͼr">"Initial commit: add Streamlit dashboard files"</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<h3 data-start="475" data-end="506">Explanation of the command:</h3>
<ul data-start="507" data-end="716">
<li data-start="507" data-end="565">
<p data-start="509" data-end="565"><code data-start="509" data-end="521">git commit</code> → creates a snapshot of your staged files</p>
</li>
<li data-start="566" data-end="618">
<p data-start="568" data-end="618"><code data-start="568" data-end="582">-m "message"</code> → a message describing the commit</p>
</li>
<li data-start="619" data-end="716">
<p data-start="621" data-end="716"><code data-start="621" data-end="670">"Initial commit: add Streamlit dashboard files"</code> → descriptive message for your first commit</p>
</li>
</ul>
<blockquote data-start="718" data-end="831">
<p data-start="720" data-end="831">You can change the message slightly if you want, but it’s common to write <code data-start="794" data-end="812">"Initial commit"</code> for the first one.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="833" data-end="836">
<p data-start="838" data-end="940">After this, your local repository <strong data-start="872" data-end="896">has a saved snapshot</strong>. Next, you’ll link it to GitHub and push.</p>

<p data-start="157" data-end="178">Here’s how to fix it:</p>
<hr data-start="180" data-end="183">
<h2 data-start="185" data-end="223"><span role="text"><strong data-start="188" data-end="223">Step 1: Set Your Name and Email</strong></span></h2>
<p data-start="225" data-end="313">Run these commands <strong data-start="244" data-end="265">once per computer</strong> (or per repository if you want local settings):</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="315" data-end="436"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> config </span><span class="ͼu">--global</span><span> user.name </span><span class="ͼr">"Your Name"</span><br><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> config </span><span class="ͼu">--global</span><span> user.email </span><span class="ͼr">"your_email@example.com"</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<ul data-start="438" data-end="573">
<li data-start="438" data-end="483">
<p data-start="440" data-end="483">Replace <code data-start="448" data-end="461">"Your Name"</code> with your full name</p>
</li>
<li data-start="484" data-end="573">
<p data-start="486" data-end="573">Replace <code data-start="494" data-end="520">"your_email@example.com"</code> with the email associated with your GitHub account</p>
</li>
</ul>
<blockquote data-start="575" data-end="711">
<p data-start="577" data-end="711"><code data-start="577" data-end="587">--global</code> means it applies to all repositories on this computer.<br data-start="642" data-end="645">
If you want to set it <strong data-start="669" data-end="691">just for this repo</strong>, remove <code data-start="700" data-end="710">--global</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="713" data-end="716">
<h2 data-start="718" data-end="757"><span role="text"><strong data-start="721" data-end="757">Step 2: Verify the Configuration</strong></span></h2>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="759" data-end="809"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="sticky z-2 select-none top-(--sticky-padding-top)"><div class="flex w-full items-center justify-between py-1.5 ps-4 pe-1.5 font-sans md:ps-5 bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary"><div class="flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 cursor-default items-center text-sm font-medium justify-self-start text-token-text-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-sm me-2.5 shrink-0"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#e45ab3" fill="currentColor"></use></svg>Bash</div><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-0.5 justify-self-end"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div></div></div><div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4"><div class="pointer-events-none sticky z-40 shrink-0 z-1!" style="top: calc(calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px) - 1px * 3); margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> config </span><span class="ͼu">--global</span><span> </span><span class="ͼu">--list</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<p data-start="811" data-end="826">You should see:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="828" data-end="889"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>user.name=Your Name</span><br><span>user.email=your_email@example.com</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<hr data-start="891" data-end="894">
<h2 data-start="896" data-end="923"><span role="text"><strong data-start="899" data-end="923">Step 3: Commit Again</strong></span></h2>
<p data-start="925" data-end="942">Now retry Step 5:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="944" data-end="1039"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="sticky z-2 select-none top-(--sticky-padding-top)"><div class="flex w-full items-center justify-between py-1.5 ps-4 pe-1.5 font-sans md:ps-5 bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary"><div class="flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 cursor-default items-center text-sm font-medium justify-self-start text-token-text-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-sm me-2.5 shrink-0"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#e45ab3" fill="currentColor"></use></svg>Bash</div><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-0.5 justify-self-end"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div></div></div><div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4"><div class="pointer-events-none sticky z-40 shrink-0 z-1!" style="top: calc(calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px) - 1px * 3); margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> add .</span><br><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> commit </span><span class="ͼu">-m</span><span> </span><span class="ͼr">"Initial commit: add Streamlit dashboard files"</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; <ul data-start="1041" data-end="1089">
<li data-start="1041" data-end="1089">
<p data-start="1043" data-end="1089">This time, it should succeed without errors.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1091" data-end="1094">
<p data-start="1096" data-end="1192">Once this is done, you can proceed with <strong data-start="1136" data-end="1165">Step 6: linking to GitHub</strong> and <strong data-start="1170" data-end="1189">Step 7: pushing</strong>.</p>
<p data-start="1194" data-end="1337" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">I can give you the <strong data-start="1213" data-end="1285">full commands from linking to GitHub to deploying on Streamlit Cloud</strong> next, so it’s all ready.
