@w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col agent-turn"><div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow"><div data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="a7431db3-a3e0-4117-b485-bd646fe2fbc1" dir="auto" data-message-model-slug="gpt-5-mini" class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1" data-turn-start-message="true" tabindex="0"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full wrap-break-word dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="244">That error usually means that <strong data-start="30" data-end="86">the required library (<code data-start="54" data-end="66">matplotlib</code>) is not installed</strong> in the environment that Streamlit Cloud is using. Streamlit Cloud doesn’t automatically know to install it unless it’s listed in a <code data-start="218" data-end="236">requirements.txt</code> file.</p>
<p data-start="246" data-end="267">Here’s how to fix it:</p>
<hr data-start="269" data-end="272">
<h2 data-start="274" data-end="314"><span role="text"><strong data-start="277" data-end="314">Step 1: Create <code data-start="294" data-end="312">requirements.txt</code></strong></span></h2>
<p data-start="316" data-end="424">In your project folder, create a file named <code data-start="360" data-end="378">requirements.txt</code> (no file extension). Add the following lines:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="426" data-end="461"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none pointer-events-auto py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div><div class="pe-11 pt-3" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span>streamlit</span><br><span>pandas</span><br><span>matplotlib</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<blockquote data-start="463" data-end="527">
<p data-start="465" data-end="527">Optional: if you plan to use NumPy later, add <code data-start="511" data-end="518">numpy</code> as well.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr data-start="529" data-end="532">
<h2 data-start="534" data-end="582"><span role="text"><strong data-start="537" data-end="582">Step 2: Push <code data-start="552" data-end="570">requirements.txt</code> to GitHub</strong></span></h2>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="584" data-end="691"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="sticky z-2 select-none top-(--sticky-padding-top)"><div class="flex w-full items-center justify-between py-1.5 ps-4 pe-1.5 font-sans md:ps-5 bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary"><div class="flex max-w-[75%] min-w-0 cursor-default items-center text-sm font-medium justify-self-start text-token-text-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-sm me-2.5 shrink-0"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#e45ab3" fill="currentColor"></use></svg>Bash</div><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-0.5 justify-self-end"><button class="flex gap-1 items-center select-none py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 size-9 rounded-full px-2" aria-label="Copy" data-state="closed"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" aria-hidden="true" class="icon-md"><use href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-cohbnghc.svg#ce3544" fill="currentColor"></use></svg></button></div></div></div><div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4"><div class="pointer-events-none sticky z-40 shrink-0 z-1!" style="top: calc(calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px) - 1px * 3); margin-bottom: calc(-4px); height: calc(4px); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 25%, white 75%);"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light" style="top: calc(var(--sticky-padding-top) + 48px); height: 1px;"></div></div></div><div class="" style="transform: none;"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼk ͼy"><div class="cm-scroller"><div class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly"><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> add requirements.txt</span><br><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> commit </span><span class="ͼu">-m</span><span> </span><span class="ͼr">"Add requirements.txt for Streamlit deployment"</span><br><span class="ͼs">git</span><span> push</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class="" style="width: 100%; transform: none;"></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<hr data-start="693" data-end="696">
<h2 data-start="698" data-end="740"><span role="text"><strong data-start="701" data-end="740">Step 3: Redeploy on Streamlit Cloud</strong></span></h2>
<ol data-start="742" data-end="966">
<li data-start="742" data-end="794">
<p data-start="745" data-end="794">Go to your Streamlit Cloud dashboard → your app</p>
</li>
<li data-start="795" data-end="857">
<p data-start="798" data-end="857">Click <strong data-start="804" data-end="832">“⋯” → “Rerun / Redeploy”</strong> (or just deploy again)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="858" data-end="966">
<p data-start="861" data-end="966">Streamlit Cloud will now read <code data-start="891" data-end="909">requirements.txt</code> and install <code data-start="922" data-end="934">matplotlib</code> along with other dependencies</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr data-start="968" data-end="971">
<h2 data-start="973" data-end="994"><span role="text"><strong data-start="976" data-end="994">Step 4: Verify</strong></span></h2>
<ul data-start="996" data-end="1132">
<li data-start="996" data-end="1060">
<p data-start="998" data-end="1060">Your app should now launch without the <code data-start="1037" data-end="1058">ModuleNotFoundError</code></p>
</li>
<li data-start="1061" data-end="1132">
<p data-start="1063" data-end="1132">All charts (pie, bar, line) using <code data-start="1097" data-end="1109">matplotlib</code> will render properly</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="1134" data-end="1137">
<p data-start="1139" data-end="1308">✅ <strong data-start="1141" data-end="1149">Tip:</strong> For future deployment issues, <strong data-start="1180" data-end="1229">always include all libraries your app imports</strong> in <code data-start="1233" data-end="1251">requirements.txt</code>. Streamlit Cloud uses this file to know what to install.</p>
<hr data-start="1310" data-end="1313">
<p data-start="1315" data-end="1477" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">If you want, I can give you a <strong data-start="1345" data-end="1411">complete working <code data-start="1364" data-end="1382">requirements.txt</code> for your current dashboard</strong>, so you can deploy without any errors.
